generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "The permanent magnet synchronous motor driving the first vertical axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]

instance GearboxActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "The cycloidal gearbox transmitting power from the motor to the robot axis with 30% motion accuracy impact from friction"
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder mounted directly on the motor measuring motor angle via MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorAngleData
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder mounted behind the gearbox measuring gearbox output angle with manufacturer-specific dynamics modeling"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxOutputAngleData
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor current sensor measuring input current (I_M) from Siemens SINUMERIK 840D CNC controller via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentData
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance MotorAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxOutputAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorAngleData, GearboxOutputAngleData, MotorCurrentData
]

instance DerivedVelocityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DerivedTorqueData
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance CoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box friction model (Coulomb-Viscous) implemented in MathWorks Simulink for analytical friction characterization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulink
]

instance StribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box friction model (Stribeck curve) implemented in MathWorks Simulink for temperature-dependent friction effects"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulink
]

instance LuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box friction model (LuGre) implemented in MathWorks Simulink for dynamic friction compensation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulink
]

instance BlackBoxFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Black-box data-driven friction model trained from real-time sensor data for adaptive friction characterization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulink
]

instance SysMLBDDFirstAxis : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram modeling the first vertical axis (motor, gearbox, cycloidal gear) for structural representation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelBasedSystemsEngineering
]

instance SysMLIBDFirstAxis : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram showing detailed internal structure of the first axis components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelBasedSystemsEngineering
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantic integration framework linking physical components to digital models via AAS for traceability"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShellFramework
]

instance DynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Manufacturer-provided dynamics model for torque/velocity derivation from sensor inputs"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulink
]

instance MeasuredDataTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor data traces (motor current, output angle, torque, angular velocity) from physical system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorAngleData
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxOutputAngleData
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:fromData DerivedVelocityData
]

instance SimulatedDataTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ideal vs. friction-affected outputs for comparison between measured and simulated system behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksSimulink
    DTDFVocab:fromData CoulombViscousModel
    DTDFVocab:fromData StribeckModel
    DTDFVocab:fromData LuGreModel
    DTDFVocab:fromData BlackBoxFrictionModel
]

instance MetadataTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Source tracing metadata linking data to MQTT channels and SysML model references for traceability"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShellFramework
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredDataTrace
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedDataTrace
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ModelBasedSystemsEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling and MathWorks Simulink for simulation of the first vertical axis"
    DTDFVocab:enables MathWorksSimulink
]

instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor data streaming protocol from Siemens SINUMERIK 840D CNC controller to digital twin"
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Semantic integration framework for linking physical and virtual models with traceability"
]

instance MathWorksSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation environment for executable friction models (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, LuGre)"
]

// C6: Services
instance FrictionAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time identification and refinement of white-box (analytical) and black-box (data-driven) friction models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionCharacterizationInsight
]

instance VisualizationDashboard : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Aggregated data visualization comparing measured vs. simulated outputs for friction deviation detection"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlOptimizationAction
]

instance ContinuousModelAdaptation : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dynamic exchange of friction models during operation to account for wear, load changes, or tooling variations"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveMaintenanceInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides AdaptiveControlParameter
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance FrictionCharacterizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time identification of static, kinetic, and viscous friction components using Coulomb-Viscous models"
]

instance ControlOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustment of friction models to minimize up to 30% motion inaccuracies during operation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Early detection of wear or load-induced changes via model deviations in friction characterization"
]

instance AdaptiveControlParameter : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Parameters for dynamic friction compensation in control algorithms (adaptive control loops)"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// Supporting components
instance RobotFirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MotorActuator, GearboxActuator
]

instance IndustrialRobotEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains RobotFirstAxisEnvironment,
        MotorEncoder, GearboxEncoder, CurrentSensor,
        CoulombViscousModel, StribeckModel, LuGreModel,
        BlackBoxFrictionModel, SysMLBDDFirstAxis,
        AssetAdministrationShell, DynamicsModel
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is **real-time (low-latency) with live data acquisition**:
  - **Data sampling rate**: Not explicitly stated, but inferred to be **high-frequency** (e.g., kilohertz-level) for sensor streams (motor current, angle) to capture dynamic friction effects.
  - **Synchronization**: Data traces are processed in **near-real-time** to enable **continuous friction model updates** during robot operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital twin constellation consists of:
  - **Centralized digital shadow** for the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot, incorporating:
    - **Live sensor data** (motor/gearbox encoders, CNC controller).
    - **Simulation models** (Simulink) for friction analysis.
    - **Dashboard visualization** for real-time comparison of measured vs. simulated data.
  - **No decentralized twins** are mentioned; the focus is on a **single-axis digital shadow** as a foundational baseline for broader digital twin development."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates across the following life-cycle stages:
  - **As designed**: Structural models (SysML Block Definition Diagram) define the robot’s first axis architecture.
  - **As manufactured**: Live sensor data and dynamics models (e.g., motor/gearbox parameters) are integrated to simulate ideal vs. friction-affected behavior.
  - **As operated**: Continuous refinement of friction models during operation to adapt to wear, load, or environmental changes."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Verification/Validation**:
    - **Sensor calibration**: Motor/gearbox encoders reduce backlash and positional uncertainty via encoder difference analysis.
    - **Model validation**: Simulation models (e.g., Simulink) are compared against measured data to validate friction models.
  - **Uncertainty management**:
    - **Parameter identification**: Manufacturer-provided dynamics models account for system-specific parameters (e.g., gear ratios, motor constants).
    - **Error mitigation**: Real-time friction model refinement reduces cumulative errors from wear or load variations.
  - **Traceability**: Metadata links data traces to their sources (e.g., MQTT channels, SysML models) for auditable validation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Technical connections between the physical twin (PT) and digital twin (DT) are established via:
  - **MQTT protocol**: Real-time bidirectional data exchange for sensor streams (motor current, angle) and derived metrics (torque, velocity).
  - **Siemens SINUMERIK 840D CNC controller**: Acts as the intermediary for sensor data acquisition and dynamics model computation.
  - **SysML/AAS integration**: Semantic linking of physical components (e.g., motor, gearbox) to virtual models for traceability."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The digital twin is deployed as a **localized, real-time system**:
  - **Hosting**: Integrated within the robot’s control infrastructure (SINUMERIK 840D CNC) or a dedicated cloud-based dashboard for visualization.
  - **Technology stack**:
    - **Simulation**: MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for model execution.
    - **Dashboard**: Custom-built visualization tool for data aggregation and comparison (e.g., measured vs. simulated outputs).
    - **Data processing**: MQTT-based pipelines for live data ingestion."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The digital twin adheres to:
  - **SysML (System Modeling Language)**: For structural modeling of the robot’s first axis.
  - **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)**: For semantic integration of physical and virtual components.
  - **MQTT protocol**: For real-time data exchange (standardized for IoT/CPS applications).
  - **MathWorks Simulink**: Industry-standard simulation toolkit for model-based systems engineering."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed through:
  - **Safety cell restrictions**: The robot’s working range is limited to **[-90°, 90°]** to prevent collisions.
  - **Passive data flow**: Digital shadow operates as a one-way data flow (no virtual-to-physical interaction), ensuring no direct control over the robot.
  - **Operational safety**: Live data analysis enables proactive friction mitigation without remote execution risks."
]
